name: @irisrun/provider-openai
description: Vendor-neutral, replay-safe model adapter — the OpenAI model_call performer behind Iris's portable model port; a peer of @irisrun/provider-anthropic behind the same port, so swapping providers leaves the agent and its byte-identical journal replay unchanged. Direct OpenAI Chat Completions over built-in fetch (zero deps). Real adapter runs only with OPENAI_API_KEY; tests use a fake fetch / fake model.
